title: Add Year field to wine form, display uploaded logo in page header and PDF

requirements.summary: Add optional 'Year' field to wine form modal after Wine Name and before Wine Style
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Year' input field appears in the Add/Edit Wine modal form
The field is optional (not required for form submission)
The field accepts a 4-digit year value
The field is positioned after the Wine Name field and before the Wine Style field
The Year value is included in the form submission payload
When editing an existing wine, the Year field is pre-populated with the stored value

file_operations.description: Add 'year' field to WineFormData interface as an optional string. Add a numeric input field for Year positioned after Wine Name and before Wine Style. Configure the input to accept 4-digit year values (e.g., 2023), with proper label, placeholder, and form state binding. Ensure the field is pre-populated when editing existing wines that have a year value.

requirements.summary: Update query hooks to include year field and display Year in wine table
acceptanceCriteria: useQueries.ts passes the year field to addWine and updateWine backend calls
The year value returned by getAllWines is read and surfaced in the UI
The Year is displayed in the wine list table alongside the Wine Name when present
Wines without a year display normally without errors

file_operations.description: Update the useAddWine and useUpdateWine mutations to pass the year field (as a nullable string) to the backend actor's addWine and updateWine methods. Ensure the year parameter is included in the mutation function call signature and properly forwarded to the backend.

Display the Year value in the wine list table alongside the Wine Name. Add the year in parentheses after the wine name (e.g., 'Kalamita Malvazija (2025)') or as a small label next to it. If a wine has no year value, display the wine name normally without appending anything. Ensure the display logic gracefully handles wines without a year field.

requirements.summary: Display new Natura Vini logo in page header with graceful fallback
acceptanceCriteria: The page header displays the new logo image
The logo image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/
If the logo fails to load, the header does not break — it falls back gracefully
The logo is visually prominent and consistent with the Naturavini brand theme

file_operations.description: Update the logo image source to use the generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/naturavini-logo-v2.dim_400x200.png. Implement an onError handler that falls back to the existing logo or plain text ('NATURA VINI') if the new logo fails to load. Ensure the logo is visually prominent and maintains the olive green header styling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add new logo to PDF export with graceful fallback
acceptanceCriteria: The exported PDF displays the new Natura Vini logo at the top
If the logo image fails to load, the PDF is still generated without the logo (no crash)
The logo placement and sizing in the PDF is consistent with the brand's visual identity

file_operations.description: Update the PDF export function to load and render the new logo image from frontend/public/assets/generated/naturavini-logo-v2.dim_400x200.png at the top of the PDF. Wrap the logo loading and rendering logic in a try-catch block or use a conditional check: if the logo cannot be loaded or added to the PDF, skip rendering it and continue generating the PDF without throwing an error. Position the logo prominently at the top of the PDF with appropriate sizing (e.g., centered, 80-100mm wide).

requirements.summary: Add Year column to PDF export after Wine Name column
acceptanceCriteria: The exported PDF includes a 'Year' column after the Wine Name column
Wines with a year value display it in the Year column
Wines without a year value show a dash (—) in the Year column

file_operations.description: Add a 'Year' column to the PDF table output, positioned immediately after the Wine Name column. For each wine row, if the wine has a year value, display it in the Year column; otherwise, display a dash (—). Adjust the table column widths and layout to accommodate the new Year column without breaking the PDF layout. Ensure the Year column header is clearly labeled.
